Bibliography

  1. E. S. Purcell. Life of Cardinal Manning.

  2. A. W. Hutton. Cardinal Manning.

  3. J. E. C. Bodley. Cardinal Manning and Other Essays.

  4. F. W. Cornish. The English Church in the Nineteenth Century.

  5. Dean Church. The Oxford Movement.

  6. Sir J. T. Coleridge. Memoir of the Rev. John Keble.

  7. Hurrell Froude. Remains.

  8. Cardinal Newman.

    Letters and Correspondence in the English Church.

    Apologia pro Vita Sua.

  9. Wilfrid Ward.

    Life of Cardinal Newman.

    W. G. Ward and the Oxford Movement.

    W. G. Ward and the Catholic Revival.

    Life of Cardinal Wiseman.

  10. H. P. Liddon.

    Life of E. B. Pusey.

  11. Tracts for the Times, by Members of the University of Oxford.

  12. Lord Morley. Life of Gladstone.

  13. Lives of the Saints, edited by J. H. Newman.

  14. Herbert Paul. Life of J. A. Froude.

  15. Mark Pattison. Autobiography.

  16. T. Mozley. Letters from Rome on the Occasion of the Ecumenical Council.

  17. Lord Acton. Letters.

  18. H. L. Smith and V. Nash. The Story of the Dockers’ Strike.
